message:
fix(witness): replace screen-scraping with structured signals in DetectStalledPolecats (gt-idrl)

Replace CapturePane + strings.Contains matching on third-party TUI strings
("trust this folder", "Quick safety check", "Bypass Permissions mode") with
structured tmux signals (GetSessionCreatedUnix + GetSessionActivity).

Sessions >90s old with no recent tmux activity are flagged as startup-stall
and AcceptStartupDialogs is called to dismiss any blocking dialogs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
